scenarios.description: parent is null returns UntrackedAttr (branch parent==null)
pseudocode: GIVEN an Attribute with key="foo" and parent=null

scenarios.description: parent is non-null returns parent's sourceRange(key) (branch parent!=null)
scenarios.precondition: Attribute constructed with a fake Attributes stub where sourceRange("foo") returns a known Range.AttributeRange instance; mocking needed to isolate Attributes.sourceRange behavior
scenarios.expectedResult: return value is the stubbed Range.AttributeRange instance
pseudocode: GIVEN an Attribute with key="foo" and parent set to a stubbed Attributes whose sourceRange("foo") returns stubRange
